RewardDescription.en: Receive a random prize with a Sin or Innocence theme! It'll appear inside your MTX stash, waiting to be unwrapped.
RewardDescription.zh: 收到了一个罪与纯净神秘宝箱！快去打开充满惊喜的宝箱吧！
